textByHash.2c028a25e8aa6c9530db13c632a3605a93166d6f: I'm afraid I don't have any suggestions...
textByHash.a467f6326519e5f279739278edb266e053a6412a: Please, don't ask me any questions. I am still too upset from our defeat at the hands of those treacherous Sinclairs.
textByHash.d96724baa624b842cac32838039cddbbad6556e2: Please, no questions. I am in mourning for our King.
textByHash.783d45b84f5b5f26b9e6317f06189f72cc257a60: How are you going to get all of us out of here?
textByHash.fa2ac483d2707409900b0da37eb7d1054c91a03a: I'm afraid not. I didn't have anything with me when we were captured.
textByHash.f9b6c15c7afed97c6ce429a7d96cd1a34269d0b2: How would I do that when I'm holding a sword? Leave me to the fighting, you find the Holy Grail!
textByHash.939a89e183ff4eabe86c2b3dccba6cc0acb4a3ea: How could this have happened to us?
textByHash.86bbf7bc0fb6b2715bf0235fb018616cce91762f: I've tried all the weapons I can find, yet none are powerful enough to break his crystal prison...
textByHash.a64ef5b12aedb0fcf6f2e247a2b877916f37e790: The Lady of the Lake is looking after it I believe... but I know not where she resides currently.
textByHash.3e346c4751b1093399097c99bb989b94664cbbd2: So... you think Mordred's behind this? I'm afraid I don't have any suggestions...
textByHash.b0e7a22fe2f3420abd5b6048ab1e68a4b062fea7: Talk to the King then adventurer. He is always looking for men of bravery to aid him in his actions.
textByHash.2f1fced00315e6e16d33901259dcb3e62c9e4a98: That was a grand adventure. I can see why you make it your profession.
